Records.description: Basso-Dixon fishnet family, basso-dixon_L2x2_massless-internal-offshell-external. Basso-Dixon fishnet B_{M,N}: an M x N rectangular grid, 4 external operators at the corners, defined in dual (region-momentum) space via products of 1/x_ij^2 propagators. The L = MN loop integral is conformal. Momentum space: the (M+1) x (N+1) vertex grid (2MN+M+N massless edges, 4 off-shell corner legs, MN loops); B_{M,1} = the M-rung 4-pt ladder; transpose symmetry fixes the canonical orientation M >= N. Value = BassoDixonI[2, 2, 1/3, 1/5].
